name: Web Search
description: Web search executes a search of the public domain using a natural language search query. The search results are available in the output. Web search offers near-real time search results, but certain time sensitive data like stock prices or weather will not consistently be current. There could be a few days lag. Be sure to pass in date/time and/or location as arguments in the query if required.

query.title: Search
query.description: The natural language query to search the web for

num.title: Number of results
num.description: The number of results. Default to 10.

siteSearch.title: Site Search
siteSearch.description: Restrict or exclude results for a domain.

formattedResults.title: Formatted results
formattedResults.description: The search results string containing title, URL, and snippet

title.title: Result title
title.description: The title of a search result item.

snippet.title: Result snippet
snippet.description: A brief summary or excerpt of a search result item.

url.title: Result url
url.description: The web address of the search result.
